{{Quote|Murdering Shodon Ko only whetted my appetite. But he was just a bureaucrat for the Navigator's Guild—old and tough.|Ssk Kahorr|<ref name="totj" />}}
'''Shodon Ko''' was a [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucrat]] who worked for the [[Hyperspace Navigator's Guild|Navigators' Guild]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]] in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]]. He was responsible for approving the dangerous [[Goluud Corridor]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] and was later [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Cha'a]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Lord/Legends|lord]] [[Ssk Kahorr]], after the latter lost his [[Cha'a drone ship|drone ship]], ''[[Zeta Five]]'', in the Corridor.

==Biography==
{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''Shodon Ko'' of the Navigators' Guild informed me yesterday we'll have a substantial bonus coming any time now.|Gav Daragon|<ref name="totj" />}}
[[File:Ssk_Kahorr.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Shodon Ko was killed and devoured by Ssk Kahorr.]]
Shodon Ko was a [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucrat]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]–affiliated [[Hyperspace Navigator's Guild|Navigators' Guild]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]].<ref name="totj" /> In [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]],<ref name="NEC" /> he approved the [[Goluud Corridor]], a short but dangerous [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] discovered by the [[Scout/Legends|explorers]] [[Gav Daragon|Gav]] and [[Jori Daragon]]. As the newly-discovered route passed near the unstable [[Red supergiant/Legends|red supergiant]] [[Primus Goluud/Legends|Primus Goluud]], Ko assigned the Goluud Corridor a high risk factor, which discouraged the Guild's customers from using it. However, [[Cha'a]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Lord/Legends|lord]] [[Ssk Kahorr]] took his chances and sent his [[Cha'a drone ship|drone ship]], ''[[Zeta Five]]'', through the Goluud Corridor.<ref name="totj" />

Ko then informed Gav Daragon that the Guild would deliver him a substantial bonus in money. However, ''Zeta Five'' was destroyed with all cargo when [[Star/Legends|solar]] flares erupted from Primus Goluud. Angered by the loss of his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], Kahorr was determined to [[Death/Legends|kill]] those responsible for mapping and approving the route. Kahorr murdered and devoured Ko, finding him old and tough, before he set out to kill the Daragons. What remained of Ko was soon discovered, in a scene described as "nasty" by Kahorr's thugs.<ref name="totj" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shodon Ko was first mentioned in the [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 1|first issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series, written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="totj" /> on [[October 9]], [[1996]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54590/star_wars_tales_of_the_jedi_-_the_golden_age_of_the_sith_1996_1|text=Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - The Golden Age of the Sith (1996) #1}}</ref>
